critical_findings.failure_mode: final continuation is derived from decision.system_response rather than enforcement.final_status
critical_findings.impact: execution status can contradict enforcement authority and record success when enforcement requires review
critical_findings.minimal_fix: make continuation/status derivation strictly enforcement.final_status-based and keep execution record fail-closed when enforcement is not allow

required_fixes.description: Make AG-01 continuation/status derivation strictly enforcement.final_status-based and keep execution record fail-closed when enforcement is not allow. (addresses F-001)
Constrain evaluation_control runtime path to replay_result-only inputs (or fail closed when eval_summary mode is used in runtime seams).
Add monitor replay-boundary lineage assertion: error_budget_status.observability_metrics_id must reference embedded observability_metrics.artifact_id.
Validate and bind control_loop.trace_context to replay artifact identity to eliminate replay/control context split-brain paths.

watch_items: Keep replay-related helper builders aligned with replay-authoritative lineage assumptions to avoid normalizing weaker fixture patterns.
Retain isolated trace_store injection discipline in chaos cases to avoid accidental fallback to process-global trace state.
failure_mode_summary: Replay-authoritative enforcement is significantly improved, but one critical enforcement-vs-execution split-brain defect and additional replay-boundary consistency gaps remain open.
